tools.name: sanctions_screen
tools.description: Screen any name against EU FSF (14k), OFAC SDN (69k), UN SC (3k), Interpol (13k) watchlists. AMLR Art. 35.

tools.name: sanctions_detail
tools.description: Full entity record for sanctions hit. Returns UN XML detail, aliases, nationality, designation.

tools.name: pep_check
tools.description: PEP (Politically Exposed Person) check via Wikidata. AMLR Art. 22 enhanced CDD for PEPs.

tools.name: adverse_media
tools.description: Negative news screening: fraud, money laundering, corruption, sanctions. AMLR Art. 55 ongoing monitoring.

tools.name: country_risk
tools.description: Country risk assessment: FATF Blacklist, Greylist, EU High-Risk. AMLR Art. 16+18.

tools.name: ubo_lookup
tools.description: Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) identification via GLEIF LEI ownership register. AMLR Art. 42.

tools.name: kyc_bundle
tools.description: Full KYC in one call: Sanctions + PEP + Adverse Media + Country Risk. Returns overall risk level and AMLR decision.

tools.name: transaction_risk
tools.description: AML transaction risk scoring: amount, corridor, sender screening. AMLR Art. 35+82.

tools.name: aml_news
tools.description: AMLR / AMLA / AMLD6 regulatory news. Topics: general, amla, amlr, sanctions, crypto_aml, fatf, de_geldwaesche, pep, kyc, str.

tools.name: amlr_calendar
tools.description: AMLR compliance milestones. Key: 1 July 2026 full application, €10k cash limit, crypto Travel Rule €0.

tools.name: watchlist_update
tools.description: Check watchlist freshness and reload from OpenSanctions. Use force_reload=true to refresh cache.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: AMLOracle server status, backend checks, and watchlist cache status.
